query:
-- Update monthlyRevenue for services where billing items are matched but revenue is still 0 or not reflecting billing
UPDATE services s
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT SUM(bi.lineAmount)
  FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
)
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM billing_items bi
  WHERE bi.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
)
AND s.monthlyRevenue = 0;
